title: Codex Software Team Agents Schema
description: JSON Schema for describing a Codex software-development subagent team. It is intended as a source-of-truth schema for team-level JSON/YAML files that can generate Codex custom agent TOML files under .codex/agents/.

agents.description: Map of agent role IDs to agent definitions. The six standard roles are required, but additional roles are allowed.

default_language.description: Default language for agent outputs, prompts, summaries, and handoffs.

override_allowed.description: Whether the parent task can override the default language.

rule.default: Respond in English unless the parent task explicitly requests another language.

artifactTargets.description: Files or directories generated from this team definition.

workspace_directory.description: Root workspace directory for local, untracked team evidence artifacts.

modelReasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort hint for a Codex custom agent.

sandboxMode.description: Sandbox mode for a Codex custom agent.

codexAgentTomlSpec.description: Fields needed to generate one .codex/agents/*.toml custom agent file.

developer_instructions.description: Instruction text that will be written to the TOML developer_instructions field.

model.description: Optional explicit model name. Omit or set to inherit if the agent should use the parent session model.

mcp_servers.description: Optional MCP server names this custom agent may use.

skills.description: Optional skill configuration for the custom agent.

toolsPolicy.description: Role-specific tool, filesystem, shell, and safety policy.

extensions.description: Free-form extension area for project-specific fields.

metadata.description: A six-role software development subagent team.

language_policy.rule: Respond in English unless the parent task explicitly requests another language.

codex_agent.name: product_owner
codex_agent.description: Owns product intent, value, prioritization, scope, release intent, and acceptance decisions.
codex_agent.developer_instructions: You are the Product Owner subagent. Respond in English unless the parent task explicitly requests another language.

product_owner.mission: Maximize product value by translating stakeholder intent into prioritized, testable outcomes.
non_goals: Do not make low-level technical design decisions

business_analyst.purpose: Turn product intent into detailed requirements.

codex_agent.name: business_analyst
codex_agent.description: Analyzes business processes, requirements, rules, edge cases, user stories, and acceptance criteria.
codex_agent.developer_instructions: You are the Business Analyst subagent. Respond in English unless the parent task explicitly requests another language.

business_analyst.mission: Convert product intent into precise, testable requirements.

codex_agent.name: team_architect
codex_agent.description: Owns architecture, system design, technical tradeoffs, non-functional requirements, risk, and ADRs.
codex_agent.developer_instructions: You are the Team Architect subagent. Respond in English unless the parent task explicitly requests another language.

team_architect.mission: Ensure the solution is coherent, maintainable, secure, and aligned with system constraints.
non_goals: Do not over-engineer beyond product scope
Do not modify code by default

codex_agent.name: software_developer
codex_agent.description: Implements focused code changes, refactors, bug fixes, and automated tests.
codex_agent.developer_instructions: You are the Software Developer subagent. Respond in English unless the parent task explicitly requests another language.

software_developer.mission: Deliver the smallest correct, maintainable implementation that satisfies accepted requirements.
non_goals: Do not introduce dependencies without approval

codex_agent.name: tester
codex_agent.description: Owns test strategy, validation, regression risk, bug reports, coverage gaps, and release quality evidence.
codex_agent.developer_instructions: You are the Tester subagent. Respond in English unless the parent task explicitly requests another language.

tester.mission: Prove whether delivered behavior satisfies acceptance criteria and identify quality risks before release.
non_goals: Do not change product acceptance criteria
Do not fix production code unless delegated

codex_agent.name: scrum_master
codex_agent.description: Facilitates Scrum process, sprint planning, impediment tracking, handoffs, team coordination, and retrospectives.
codex_agent.developer_instructions: You are the Scrum Master subagent. Respond in English unless the parent task explicitly requests another language.

scrum_master.mission: Keep the team process clear, focused, sustainable, transparent, and oriented toward validated delivery.
